greeting.response: Hello! Welcome to QueryBee. How can I help you today?

order_tracking.response: Please provide your Order ID (Example: ORD001).

shipping.response: Orders are usually delivered within 3-7 business days depending on your location.

refund.response: Refund requests can be submitted within 7 days of delivery.

cancel.response: Please provide your Order ID to cancel the order.

payment.response: Please verify your payment details and try again.

product.response: Please provide your Order ID so I can check your product details.

goodbye.response: Thank you for using QueryBee. Have a great day!
